refactor.refactored_sql: with import as ( select CurrencyCode, CurrencyName from MigrationTest.bronze.Currency ), logical as ( select CurrencyCode as CurrencyAlternateKey, CurrencyName from import ), final as ( select CurrencyAlternateKey, CurrencyName from logical ) select * from final
